files_touched.changes: Added reproducible 1990s-rock smoke harness with ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList prompt passing, timestamped diagnostics directory, stdout/stderr logs, strict audio mode, and smoke_summary.json.
Clamped generate_organ_tone key-click length to the actual audio buffer and returned empty audio for zero-duration notes to avoid short-note render crashes.
Added --require-audio strict smoke/CI semantics and MIDI-only human summary wording when audio is unavailable.
Added focused organ-tone tests for short, zero-duration, and normal-duration generation.
Extended CLI render-diagnostic tests to cover --require-audio exit code 2 / JSON success false and default permissive behavior.
Added static smoke-harness contract tests for exact prompt, strict-audio flag, summary/log artifacts, and split-safe argument passing.
Recorded completed upgrade-rock-runtime-hardening-028 task.
Captured strict audio smoke artifact-gate pattern.
Recorded runtime-hardening files touched, changes made, and focused verification proof.
Recorded files touched and smoke verification summary for the 1990s rock plan update.
Recorded the successful pattern that unsupported genres must be connected across parser/defaults/strategy/renderer/analyzer before judging musicality.
Added completed upgrade-rock-quality-ui-plan-027 task near the top of task_queue.
Created detailed source-grounded plan for the 1990s rock quality degradation and JUCE UI upgrade investigation.
Recorded the external environment action that launched the official PowerShell 7.6.0 MSI after verifying winget was unavailable and the GitHub asset URL was valid.

Updated the smoke-test plan to use the new explicit --duration-bars 16 override and documented the new Step 5 render diagnostics artifacts plus the recommendation to avoid inline reruns when editor responsiveness is a concern.
Added --duration-bars CLI wiring plus bounded helpers that persist *_render_report.json and *_render_error.txt artifacts for Step 5 no-audio and exception outcomes.
Added renderer-owned failure capture and current-stage diagnostics so render reports record additive render_status metadata for no-audio and exception paths.
Extended render report schema coverage to assert the new additive render_status failure metadata round-trips through JSON persistence.
Added focused regressions covering CLI --duration-bars forwarding and persisted Step 5 render diagnostics on renderer exceptions without real audio rendering.
Added python.terminal.activateEnvironment=false so new integrated terminals in this workspace no longer auto-activate the MUSE .venv.
Verified the workspace settings file contains no python terminal activation or terminal startup hook settings that would explain automatic .venv activation.
Removed the stale duplicate sprint_8 object so orchestration.json now has a single canonical sprint_8 entry.
Removed the stale cmake.sourceDirectory old-repo pointer and added cmake.configureOnOpen=false so CMake Tools no longer auto-configures the workspace on open.
Replaced dead multimodal-ai-music-gen include paths and hard-coded C:/JUCE/modules with current-workspace JUCE source/build include paths only.
Inspected workspace-level VS Code settings and found a stale absolute cmake.sourceDirectory pointing to an old repo path outside the current workspace.
Inspected workspace-level C/C++ properties and found stale include paths referencing the removed multimodal-ai-music-gen layout and a hard-coded C:/JUCE/modules path.
Verified the repo contains a single JUCE CMake project at MUSE/juce, making CMake Tools the likely owner of the startup kit/compiler prompt.

Added a runnable three-prompt pre-implementation smoke-test plan covering a no-reference control, an already-wired harmonic-reference case, and a pre-Slice-2 groove baseline capture with fixed seed and output/_smoke artifact collection.
Recorded the completed smoke-test planning task and made the pending Milestone 4 Slice 2 task explicitly reference the pre-implementation smoke pass as its next precondition.
Captured the new pattern and decision to use a fixed-seed three-prompt smoke pass before broadening reference reuse into a new transported sink.
Inspected documented CLI command examples and reference-generation usage so the smoke-test plan could use real supported main.py entrypoints.
Inspected existing generated output artifacts and selected concrete local WAV references for the harmonic and groove smoke-test runs.
Inspected the current score-plan schema and confirmed it has no timing/groove field yet, making schema transport a required part of the next groove swing slice.
Inspected the adapter to confirm chord/mastering transport exists but score plans do not yet land any timing fields onto ParsedPrompt swing controls.

Verified ParsedPrompt already exposes use_swing, swing_amount, timing_humanization, and humanization_profile, which narrows the safest next groove slice to swing reuse through existing parsed timing fields.
Checked current reference merge behavior and confirmed main.py only applies drum_density, trap_hihats, and has_808 from generation_params, leaving reference swing unconsumed today.

Added producer-local reference chord_map seeding helpers and wired them into score-plan creation/refinement so referenceProfile.raw.chords can affect actual harmonic decisions when plans omit chord_map.
Added focused producer reference-chord proofs covering seeding, preserve-existing behavior, fail-open cases, duplicate same-bar collapse, out-of-range dropping, and create/refine wiring.
Inspected producer score-plan creation/refinement and schema normalization to confirm chord_map seeding can be added locally without widening protocol or Python runtime surfaces.
Verified that reference analysis already exposes structured chord events and that the truthful Slice 1 source is referenceProfile.raw.chords rather than generation_params.
Recorded the Milestone 4 readiness verdict and the recommended first bounded Milestone 4 slice using the existing reference chord_map path.
Advanced next-phase metadata from Milestone 3 reassessment to Milestone 4 Slice 1 preparation and queued the chord-map seeding slice.
Extended generate_corrections() so explicit too-high onset-density issues in conservative drum-light contexts reuse the existing mute_drums correction path without introducing new correction actions.
Added focused regressions for onset-density-to-mute_drums escalation, low-density and non-drum-light negative cases, and duplicate mute_drums deduplication.
Inspected onset-density issue generation and correction handling to select the next truthful analyzer-to-repair reuse slice after directional EQ repair.
Inspected current analyzer regression coverage to identify the safest proof boundary for onset-density-to-mute_drums escalation in drum-light contexts.

Updated centroid-driven adjust_eq correction generation to emit explicit too-bright vs too-dark detail from the existing expected centroid range, while keeping the change bounded to the centroid path.
Added focused correction-engine tests for high-centroid too-bright and low-centroid too-dark directional adjust_eq detail.
Made adjust_eq actionable only when explicit direction is present, added a small clamped mastering brightness/warmth mutation for directional EQ, and preserved non-directional EQ as guidance-only.
Extended the producer repair proof harness for directional EQ mutation, non-directional no-op behavior, and deterministic retry routing with explicit EQ direction.
Inspected correction generation to confirm adjust_eq currently emits non-directional detail from spectral-centroid issues and therefore is not yet safe for producer-only deterministic EQ mutation.

Inspected current retry-routing and output-analysis correction handling to confirm mastering brightness/warmth sinks already exist while adjust_eq remains intentionally guidance-only unless direction becomes explicit.
Inspected the focused JS repair proof harness to confirm adjust_eq currently proves non-mutation plus conservative guidance and is ready for directional EQ extension in Slice 3.
Inspected analyzer regression coverage to identify the safest place to add explicit too-bright vs too-dark correction generation proofs for Milestone 3 Slice 3.
Recorded Milestone 3 Slice 3 preparation as analyzer-emitted directional EQ repair plus bounded producer mastering mutation, including exact file boundaries, guardrails, and proof plan.
Queued Milestone 3 Slice 3 as the next pending task and advanced next-phase metadata to directional EQ repair.
Captured the successful prep decision that deterministic EQ repair requires analyzer-emitted direction before producer mutation.

Added a bounded retry-plan chooser so actionable structured output-analysis corrections can drive the next retry deterministically through the concretely mutated heuristic plan when critic metrics are otherwise green, while preserving the broader _refineScorePlan() path in all other cases.

Extended the focused producer repair proof script with async routing cases proving deterministic retry selection for actionable structured corrections plus fallback to broader refinement when corrections are missing or critic metrics still fail.
Recorded accepted Milestone 3 Slice 2 scope, the source-of-truth decision to avoid apparent section/take protocol surfaces, the 8/8 proof set, and the next explicit-EQ-direction follow-on slice.
Recorded Milestone 3 Slice 2 as completed and advanced next-phase metadata toward the next bounded analyzer-to-repair slice.
Captured the successful Milestone 3 pattern that deterministic repair-routed retries are safe when grounded in actionable corrections and clean critic metrics.

Translated structured outputAnalysis.corrections into concrete score-plan repair mutations for mute_drums, swap_instrument -> piano, and adjust_dynamics while preserving conservative adjust_eq guidance-only behavior and leaving _passesAudioValidation() unchanged.

Added focused producer repair proofs covering mute_drums mutation, piano swap mutation, adjust_dynamics mastering mutation, conservative EQ guidance behavior, and unchanged audio-validation gating semantics.

Re-applied avoid_instruments and avoid_drums after track-derived instrument/drum adaptation so producer-written repair exclusions become effective downstream even though ParsedPrompt.__post_init__() has already run.
Added focused regressions proving avoided drum and non-drum instruments are removed after score-plan track adaptation when the same values appear in avoid_drums or avoid_instruments.
Recorded accepted Milestone 3 Slice 1 scope, proof set, downstream exclusion-bridge fix, and the next targeted regeneration/take-selection follow-up slice.
Recorded Milestone 3 Slice 1 as completed and advanced next-phase metadata to the next bounded analyzer-to-repair slice.
Captured the successful Milestone 3 pattern that adapter-side reapplication of exclusions is required when score-plan repairs write avoid lists after track adaptation.

Added explicit-arc-aware primary chord register shaping so high-tension sections can lift the main chord bed by a clean section-wide octave when a usable explicit tension arc exists, while failing open if the shift would not fit the chord instrument range.

Added and refined focused regressions proving primary chord register lift under explicit high tension, fail-open behavior for missing/unusable arcs, and strategy-path coverage for the new chord-register authority slice.
Recorded Milestone 2 Slice 2 completion, updated Milestone 2 to slices 1-2 complete, and documented the accepted register-authority proof plus remaining follow-on surfaces.
Moved Milestone 2 Slice 2 from pending to completed with implementation and verification details and advanced next-phase metadata toward the next bounded tension-authority slice.
Recorded the successful pattern of using explicit-arc-only section-wide register lifting on the primary chord bed before attempting broader tension-authority refactors.
Inspected the primary chord-track implementation to evaluate the safest next Milestone 2 surface after the accepted auxiliary-layer gating slice.
Recorded the prepared Milestone 2 Slice 2 target, guardrails, planned tests, and rationale favoring primary chord register authority as the next bounded tension slice.
Queued Milestone 2 Slice 2 as a pending implementation task targeting explicit-arc-aware primary chord register shaping.
Recorded the decision to prefer primary chord register authority over transition or arranger refactors for the next bounded tension slice.

Added explicit-arc-aware tension gating for auxiliary orchestration layers so secondary Brass/Choir chord tracks and the Texture track respond to section-level tension authority while preserving fail-open baseline behavior when no usable arc exists.
Added deterministic regressions proving high tension increases auxiliary Brass/Choir activity, high tension reduces Texture activity, and missing tension arcs fail open for auxiliary generation.
Recorded Milestone 2 Slice 1 completion, moved Milestone 2 to in-progress, and documented the bounded auxiliary-layer orchestration proof plus remaining tension-authority work.
Created a clean Milestone 1 checkpoint commit (811c256) after the verified motif-development wave so Milestone 2 can begin from a fresh baseline.

Added a primary chord-track motif accent hook that resolves section motif assignments and reuses accent patterns as subtle onset-group velocity contours in both strategy and fallback chord paths while failing open on lookup or accent issues.
Added deterministic integration proofs for chord-track onset-group motif accent contouring and fail-open behavior when section motif lookup is unusable.
Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 3 completion, marked Milestone 1 complete, and pointed follow-on work to Milestone 2 tension-authority changes.

Added dedicated Ethiopian-family motif fallbacks for ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional so those genres no longer collapse to the generic motif path when the motif library is empty or has no direct match.

Added Ethiopian-family motif mappings aligned to the real arrangement templates and expanded motif-aware melody participation for mapped Ethiopian-family sections only inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs().
Added an Ethiopian-family-only bass velocity contour hook that reuses section motif accent patterns without changing bass pitch or timing and fails open when motif lookup is unavailable.
Extended genre-specific motif fallback coverage to ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional.
Added Ethiopian-family mapping alignment and motif-aware melody enablement coverage while preserving plain create_arrangement defaults.
Added cinematic pre_chorus motif playback proof, Ethiopian bass accent-pattern wiring proof, and corrected the cinematic expectation to match scale-snapped melody output in C minor.
Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 2 completion, updated milestone status to slices 1-2 complete, and narrowed the remaining Milestone 1 follow-up work.
Added dedicated motif fallbacks for cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul so those genres no longer collapse to the generic motif path when the library has no direct match.

Aligned classical motif mappings with real section names, added fragment transform support, cloned mapping assignments defensively, and enabled motif-aware melody participation for thematic non-chorus sections inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs().
Generalized motif melody lookup to any melody-enabled section and moved section counters ahead of the melody gate so repeated sections like verse_2 stay aligned with arrangement motif assignments.
Added regressions proving cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul use dedicated motif fallbacks instead of the plain generic identity.
Added fragment, classical mapping, isolated mapping copy, and motif-aware non-chorus melody enablement coverage for the motif-depth slice.
Added verse_2 integration coverage proving non-chorus repeated sections resolve the correct motif assignment in the melody track.
Updated Milestone 1 status/checklist and recorded the completed Slice 1 execution log with focused verification results and follow-up risks.
Created a durable implementation tracker capturing the current code-grounded musicality roadmap, milestone ordering, acceptance criteria, and preferred supervisor-builder-verifier execution model.
Added first-class neo_soul normalization/default coverage so neo_soul no longer depends on adjacent genre defaults
Added dedicated neo_soul motif and arrangement template so arranger no longer falls back to trap_soul for neo_soul prompts
Included neo_soul in fallback instrument preload and per-stem processing gates for warmer R&B-like runtime routing
Added dedicated neo_soul gain-staging template and alias handling so neo_soul avoids trap fallback
Added conservative rendered-audio target profiles for rnb, trap_soul, house, ambient, ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional
Added scorer regressions proving the expanded genre set no longer uses the 0.75 unknown-genre path
Added neo_soul normalization/default coverage tests
Added neo_soul arrangement coverage so motif/template behavior is no longer validated only through fallback
Added neo_soul gain-staging regression to prove the genre uses dedicated staging instead of trap fallback
Inspected reference-profile frequency bands and mastering-oriented spectral analysis to assess reuse potential for broader genre validation
Confirmed genre-specific spectral guardrails exist but are still advisory and not consistently wired into rendering or acceptance
Confirmed sonic fingerprints include pitch and spectral descriptors, but those features are not yet used for key-aware or role-band-aware validation
Promoted neo_soul to a first-class parsed genre and removed the lingering InstrumentResolutionService annotation diagnostic
Added explicit neo_soul output-analysis targets and onset-density scoring so neo-soul no longer passes on a neutral unknown-genre fallback
Producer now requires rendered-audio validation when audio exists and will not accept critic-bypass success if output analysis fails
Inspected rendered-audio analysis scoring and confirmed neo_soul falls through to the neutral unknown-genre score path
Inspected success criteria and confirmed ProducerAgent does not hard-gate on rendered-audio output analysis
Confirmed live neo_soul render report recorded genre_match_score=0.75 and passed=true despite the missing neo_soul scorer profile
Added structured track-planning mode so Producer can use real Researcher handoffs for per-track decomposition
Replaced synthetic per-track planning calls with Producer-to-Researcher handoffs and recorded handoff-backed telemetry
Added render report regression coverage for mastering fields and limiter ceiling diagnostics
Moved critic bypass to final attempt only and added heuristic score-plan refinement for BKAS, ADC, and VLC failures
Added supported model fallback selection, in-place score-plan repair, and render-safe duration fitting for producer plans
Added verifier-side model fallback selection for preflight score plan review
Fixed latent IndexError bug: compute_vlc now filters empty voicings before processing
Rewritten with 6 wiring tests: voice_leading_wired, style_policy_genre_dna, quality_gate_extraction, preference_loop, quality_gate_known_good
Tightened 2 assertions (pitch-class subset, root note validation) + 2 new tests (invalid chord, empty progression)
Added 5 edge-case tests: vlc_empty_list, vlc_single_voicing, vlc_empty_voicing_skipped, bkas_empty_bass, bkas_empty_kicks
Tightened 2 assertions + new test_unknown_genre_raises
Tightened signal_count assertion + new test_corrupted_json_recovery
Tightened embed dimension to == 384, similarity to > 0.1

changes_made.description: Added reproducible 1990s rock smoke harness.
changes_made.diff_summary: New PowerShell script uses the exact rock prompt as one ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList value, writes generation.stdout.log/generation.stderr.log, polls the child PID up to 8 minutes, discovers metadata/MIDI/audio/render artifacts, writes smoke_summary.json, and exits strictly with --require-audio when requested.

changes_made.description: Fixed short organ-note render crash.
changes_made.diff_summary: generate_organ_tone now returns an empty ndarray for zero-length notes and clamps the key-click duration to len(audio) before adding click noise, preserving normal key-click behavior for regular notes.

changes_made.description: Added strict audio success semantics for smoke/CI.
changes_made.diff_summary: Added --require-audio, render_report render_status failure detection, JSON success=false and exit code 2 under strict audio failure, while keeping default missing-audio runs permissive and updating human summary text to MIDI-only when audio is unavailable.

changes_made.description: Added focused organ-tone regressions.
changes_made.diff_summary: Covers 0.001s short organ notes, zero-duration notes, expected ndarray lengths, and no NaNs.

changes_made.description: Extended CLI render diagnostics tests for --require-audio.
changes_made.diff_summary: Adds fake failed render_report coverage proving --require-audio returns code 2 / JSON success false, and default behavior remains code 0 / JSON success true for the same missing-audio result.

changes_made.description: Added static smoke harness contract tests.
changes_made.diff_summary: Asserts exact prompt, strict audio flag, summary/log artifact names, duration/seed flags, and no Start-Process/-ArgumentList split-prone pattern.

changes_made.description: Updated orchestration state for completed milestone 1 / PR 1-3 implementation.
changes_made.diff_summary: Added upgrade-rock-runtime-hardening-028 completion record, strict audio artifact-gate memory pattern, and context files/changes/verifications entries.

changes_made.description: Added the 2026-05-14 1990s rock quality degradation and UI upgrade plan.
changes_made.diff_summary: New markdown document records smoke artifacts, source-grounded findings, preserve list, phased generation/UI plans, and 10 PR-sized follow-up tasks.

changes_made.description: Added explicit smoke-duration CLI wiring and persisted render failure artifacts.
changes_made.diff_summary: Exposed --duration-bars on the normal generation CLI path, forwarded it into the existing run_generation duration sink, and added helpers that always persist render_report/render_error artifacts for Step 5 no-audio or exception outcomes.

changes_made.description: Captured renderer-owned failure context and stage metadata.
changes_made.diff_summary: Added additive render_status failure metadata plus lightweight current-stage markers so procedural and exception render failures become inspectable without breaking existing report fields.

changes_made.description: Expanded render-report schema proof for failure metadata.
changes_made.diff_summary: Added a round-trip regression asserting the new render_status success/current_stage/failure fields persist through write_last_render_report().

changes_made.description: Added focused runtime hardening regressions.
changes_made.diff_summary: New tests prove CLI --duration-bars forwarding and that Step 5 renderer exceptions still leave behind render_report and render_error artifacts.

changes_made.description: Hardened the smoke plan to use the new explicit duration flag and diagnostic artifacts.
changes_made.diff_summary: Documented the 72-bar prompt-expansion finding, switched the smoke commands to --duration-bars 16, and noted that Step 5 failures now persist render diagnostics outside of server mode.

changes_made.description: Recorded read-only preparation for Milestone 4 Slice 2
changes_made.diff_summary: Added the bounded groove/timing Slice 2 plan focused on reference swing reuse through the existing ParsedPrompt timing path, including exact file boundary, guardrails, and proof targets.

changes_made.description: Implemented producer-local reference chord progression seeding
changes_made.diff_summary: Added conservative chord_map seeding from referenceProfile.raw.chords on create/refine paths, preserving existing chord_map authority and fail-open behavior for unusable reference data.

changes_made.description: Added focused proof harness for Milestone 4 Slice 1
changes_made.diff_summary: Created bounded JS proofs for chord_map seeding, preserve-existing behavior, malformed/sparse fail-open cases, duplicate-bar collapse, out-of-range dropping, and create/refine path wiring.

changes_made.description: Refined Milestone 4 Slice 1 preparation with verified source shape and producer-only boundary
changes_made.diff_summary: Clarified that Milestone 4 Slice 1 should consume referenceProfile.raw.chords, remain producer-local plus a focused JS proof file, and preserve existing chord_map authority/fail-open behavior.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 4 readiness and Slice 1 preparation
changes_made.diff_summary: Added a readiness verdict that Milestone 3's strongest truthful deterministic repair slices are complete and prepared Milestone 4 Slice 1 as producer-side reference chord_map seeding.

changes_made.description: Escalated explicit drum-light onset-density overloads into mute_drums repairs
changes_made.diff_summary: generate_corrections() now maps onset_density issues with parsed high bounds <= 2.0 and actual values above that bound into the existing mute_drums correction path, preserving downstream reuse and deduplication.

changes_made.description: Added focused onset-density repair regressions
changes_made.diff_summary: New analyzer tests cover high drum-light onset-density mute escalation, low-density and high non-drum-light negative cases, and duplicate mute_drums deduplication.

changes_made.description: Emit explicit directional adjust_eq detail for centroid mismatches.
changes_made.diff_summary: Centroid-driven corrections now distinguish too bright/top-end too hot from too dark/dull using the existing expected_range field.

changes_made.description: Cover directional centroid correction generation.
changes_made.diff_summary: Added focused tests for high-centroid bright repair detail and low-centroid dark repair detail.

changes_made.description: Consume explicit directional adjust_eq conservatively in producer repair logic.
changes_made.diff_summary: Added explicit EQ-direction parsing, small clamped mastering brightness/warmth mutation, and actionable retry gating that excludes non-directional adjust_eq.

changes_made.description: Prove directional EQ repair and deterministic retry behavior.
changes_made.diff_summary: Added JS proofs for too-bright and too-dark mastering nudges, non-directional guidance-only EQ, and deterministic retry with explicit EQ direction.

changes_made.description: Added primary chord register authority for Milestone 2 Slice 2
changes_made.diff_summary: The primary `Chords` track now applies a deterministic section-wide +12 semitone register lift in higher-tension sections only when a usable explicit tension arc exists, with conservative whole-section fail-open behavior if the shifted notes would exceed the chord instrument range. The lift is applied on both the strategy and fallback chord paths without altering harmony, rhythm, durations, density, or adjacent musical systems.

changes_made.description: Added focused primary chord register-authority regressions
changes_made.diff_summary: New tests prove high explicit tension raises the primary chord register center, missing or unusable arcs do not trigger the register lift, and the same lift applies to the strategy-returned chord path as well as the fallback chord path.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 2 Slice 2 completion
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated the tracker to mark Milestone 2 in progress with slices 1-2 complete and documented the bounded primary chord register-authority implementation, proof set, and carry-forward risks.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 2 Slice 2 completion
changes_made.diff_summary: Moved the explicit-arc-aware primary chord register shaping task to completed and advanced next-phase metadata to the next bounded tension-authority slice.

changes_made.description: Captured Slice 2 success pattern
changes_made.diff_summary: Recorded that a deterministic explicit-arc-only section-wide register lift on the primary chord bed safely increases tension authority without rewriting harmony, rhythm, density, or adjacent track systems.

changes_made.description: Prepared Milestone 2 Slice 2
changes_made.diff_summary: Documented explicit-arc-aware primary chord register shaping as the next bounded tension-authority slice, including why it is safer than transition rewiring or arranger-side section-config refactors plus the planned proof set.

changes_made.description: Queued Milestone 2 Slice 2 implementation task
changes_made.diff_summary: Added a pending task for explicit-arc-aware primary chord register shaping on the Chords track with planned files and next-phase metadata.

changes_made.description: Captured Milestone 2 Slice 2 preparation decision
changes_made.diff_summary: Recorded that the safest next tension-authority slice is primary chord register-center shaping because it offers main-bed orchestration authority from a single existing surface while preserving fail-open behavior and avoiding broader transition/arranger refactors.

changes_made.description: Added auxiliary-layer tension authority for Milestone 2 Slice 1
changes_made.diff_summary: Secondary Brass/Choir chord layers and the Texture track now use explicit usable tension arcs to thin, gate, or suppress section-level note emission while preserving existing velocity scaling and fail-open no-arc behavior.

changes_made.description: Added focused auxiliary-layer tension regressions
changes_made.diff_summary: New tests prove explicit high-tension arcs increase Brass/Choir note-on activity, reduce Texture note-on activity, and preserve baseline auxiliary generation when arrangement.tension_arc is missing.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 2 Slice 1 completion
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated the tracker to mark Milestone 2 in progress with Slice 1 complete and documented scope, proof, and carry-forward risks for later tension-authority slices.

changes_made.description: Committed the completed Milestone 1 musicality wave
changes_made.diff_summary: Created git commit 811c256 (feat(musicality): complete milestone 1 motif development) covering the verified Slice 1-3 motif work and tracker/state updates, leaving the MUSE working tree clean before Milestone 2.

changes_made.description: Added conservative chord-track motif reuse for Milestone 1 Slice 3
changes_made.diff_summary: The primary Chords track now optionally resolves the section motif and applies a subtle shared onset-level velocity contour from the motif accent pattern across both strategy-generated and fallback chord notes, without changing harmony, timing, or voicing behavior.

changes_made.description: Added chord-track motif contour and fail-open regressions
changes_made.diff_summary: New deterministic integration tests prove chord onset groups inherit motif accent contouring consistently across strategy and fallback chord paths and that unusable motif lookups leave chord generation unchanged.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 3 and closed Milestone 1
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated the tracker to mark Milestone 1 complete after the final low-risk chord-track reuse slice and documented the focused proof plus carry-forward risks.

changes_made.description: Added Ethiopian-family motif fallbacks for Milestone 1 Slice 2
changes_made.diff_summary: MotifGenerator now dispatches dedicated fallback generators for ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional before the generic motif path, with genre-specific names, tags, rhythms, and accent patterns.

changes_made.description: Wired Ethiopian-family motif mappings and scoped melody broadening
changes_made.diff_summary: Added section-correct motif mappings for Ethiopian-family templates and extended motif-aware melody enablement only for mapped Ethiopian-family sections inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs(), leaving plain create_arrangement defaults unchanged.

changes_made.description: Added conservative Ethiopian-family bass motif reuse
changes_made.diff_summary: Bass generation now optionally contours note velocities from section motif accent patterns for Ethiopian-family motif-aware arrangements while preserving pitch, timing, and fail-open behavior.

changes_made.description: Extended motif fallback regressions to Ethiopian-family genres
changes_made.diff_summary: The parametrized fallback test now proves Ethiopian-family genres return dedicated motif identities instead of the generic motif path and still convert cleanly to MIDI notes.

changes_made.description: Added Ethiopian-family arrangement wiring regressions
changes_made.diff_summary: New tests prove Ethiopian-family motif mappings match actual arrangement sections and that motif-aware melody enablement broadens only inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs().

changes_made.description: Added cinematic and Ethiopian motif integration proofs
changes_made.diff_summary: New integration tests prove cinematic pre_chorus motif sequencing reaches the melody track with scale snapping and that Ethiopian motif accents shape bass velocities without changing bass pitch or timing.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 2 completion
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated Milestone 1 to slices 1-2 complete and added an execution log covering Ethiopian-family motif depth, conservative bass reuse, focused test proof, and residual risks.

changes_made.description: Added dedicated fallback motifs for the first Milestone 1 genre slice
changes_made.diff_summary: MotifGenerator now normalizes genre keys and uses dedicated algorithmic motif generators for cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul before falling back to the generic motif path.

changes_made.description: Expanded motif-aware section coverage and repaired classical mapping alignment
changes_made.diff_summary: Classical motif mappings now match intro/verse/variation/chorus/outro, fragment transform support was added, motif assignments are cloned defensively, and motif-aware arrangements can opt intro/verse/pre_chorus/bridge/outro into melody without changing create_arrangement defaults.

changes_made.description: Made motif playback available to any melody-enabled section
changes_made.diff_summary: The melody track now attempts motif lookup for any melody-enabled section and updates section counters before gating so repeated names like verse_2 remain aligned with arranger-generated motif assignments.

changes_made.description: Locked in genre-specific motif fallback behavior
changes_made.diff_summary: Added parametrized coverage proving cinematic, classical, rnb, and neo_soul fallbacks are not the generic motif identity and still convert cleanly to MIDI notes.

changes_made.description: Added focused regressions for motif-aware arrangement behavior
changes_made.diff_summary: New tests cover fragment retrieval, classical section-name alignment, defensive motif-mapping copies, and scoped non-chorus melody enablement in motif-aware arrangements.

changes_made.description: Added repeated non-chorus motif playback coverage
changes_made.diff_summary: A new integration test proves a melody-enabled second verse resolves motif_assignments['verse_2'] and emits the expected motif-derived pitches.

changes_made.description: Recorded Milestone 1 Slice 1 completion
changes_made.diff_summary: Updated Milestone 1 to in-progress with slice-1-complete status, checked its verification boxes, and added an execution log covering scope, files, test proofs, and remaining work.

changes_made.description: Added a new masterclass musicality tracker for future phased implementation
changes_made.diff_summary: Documented source-of-truth findings, milestone sequencing, acceptance criteria, and the recommended recursive-supervisor/recursive-builder/recursive-verifier execution pattern for autopilot-driven work.

changes_made.description: Enabled real per-track subagent decomposition through Researcher handoffs
changes_made.diff_summary: Researcher now supports a narrow structured track-planning mode, letting Producer record genuine handoffs for drums/bass/keys/lead/pad/fx instead of internal-only telemetry

changes_made.description: Switched per-track decomposition to actual orchestration handoffs
changes_made.diff_summary: Producer now hands each track plan to Researcher with session-backed handoff history and merges the structured per-track plan back into the score plan before generation

changes_made.description: Locked in mastering diagnostics report contract
changes_made.diff_summary: Regression test now asserts target_lufs, master_ceiling_db, stem_headroom_db, brightness_target, warmth_target, and the true_peak_limiter stage string are preserved in render reports

changes_made.description: Made producer refinement loop real instead of bypassing on the first critic failure
changes_made.diff_summary: Critic-gate bypass now only happens on the final attempt, and failed critics trigger heuristic groove/arrangement/voice-leading adjustments before the model refines the score plan

changes_made.description: Hardened producer planning to preserve user intent and fit within current server runtime limits
changes_made.diff_summary: Changed director/verifier defaults to supported Copilot models, added model fallback chain, repaired invalid optional plan fields, and compressed oversized arrangements to explicit/render-safe bar counts

changes_made.description: Made score-plan preflight resilient to unsupported model defaults
changes_made.diff_summary: Added verifier model fallback chain so preflight review stays active when the preferred model is unavailable

changes_made.description: Added get_ticks_per_bar() helper function for dynamic bar length calculation
changes_made.diff_summary: +18 lines: get_ticks_per_bar() calculates ticks per bar for any time signature including compound meters (6/8→1440, 12/8→2880). Also added time_signature: (6, 8) to ethio_jazz GENRE_DEFAULTS

changes_made.description: Extract time_signature from GENRE_DEFAULTS during prompt parsing
changes_made.diff_summary: +4 lines: Look up genre in GENRE_DEFAULTS and extract time_signature, defaulting to (4, 4). Pass to ParsedPrompt constructor

changes_made.description: Updated generate_ethiopian_drum_pattern() to use dynamic time signature
changes_made.diff_summary: +10 lines: Added time_signature parameter with (6, 8) default, calculate ticks_per_bar dynamically using get_ticks_per_bar(), updated all pulse calculations for eskista, traditional, ethio_jazz, and default styles

changes_made.description: Pass time_signature to generate_ethiopian_drum_pattern() from parsed prompt
changes_made.diff_summary: Modified 4 generate_drums() methods to pass parsed.time_signature parameter

verifications.target: 1990s rock smoke artifacts and plan coverage
verifications.details: Smoke correctness FAIL: parsed genre was trap_soul instead of rock and audio output was null after render_exception @ render_tracks. Diagnostic evidence PASS: generation logs, project_metadata.json, session_manifest.json, MIDI, render_report, and render_error artifacts were present under output/_diagnostics/rock_1990s_20260514_044327; failed Start-Process splitting attempt was captured under output/_diagnostics/rock_1990s_20260514_044251.

recursive-verifier confirmed --duration-bars is wired into normal generation and that Step 5 now persists render_report/render_error artifacts with additive render_status failure metadata; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_render_report_schema.py tests/test_main_render_diagnostics.py -ra -vv passed 5/5; get_errors reported no issues in touched tests/audio_renderer and only a pre-existing unresolved import warning in main.py for multimodal_gen.instrument_index.
Added python.terminal.activateEnvironment=false to ../.vscode/settings.json; get_errors reported no issues in the edited file.

No repo-local terminal startup hook or python.terminal.activateEnvironment workspace setting was found; terminal_last_command showed an explicit Activate.ps1 invocation, which is consistent with VS Code Python extension activation or terminal session restore.
Removed the duplicate sprint_8 block; get_errors now reports no issues in .github/state/orchestration.json and only one sprint_8 key remains.
Workspace .vscode/settings.json and .vscode/c_cpp_properties.json were updated without touching JUCE project files; get_errors reported no issues in either edited config file.

verifications.target: VS Code startup 'Scan for a kit/compiler' prompt investigation
verifications.details: Workspace inspection found a stale cmake.sourceDirectory absolute path in ../.vscode/settings.json and stale cpptools include paths in ../.vscode/c_cpp_properties.json. Combined with the JUCE CMake project under MUSE/juce, this strongly indicates a workspace/extension configuration bug rather than a MUSE runtime bug.

Tracker now contains three concrete fixed-seed smoke commands using supported main.py CLI entrypoints plus real local reference WAVs; orchestration and memory were updated to make the smoke pass the next pre-Slice-2 baseline step.

Read-only decomposition confirmed the safest truthful next Milestone 4 slice is reference groove swing seeding through a minimal timing.swing_amount field carried by the score-plan schema and adapter into existing ParsedPrompt swing controls, while deferring broader groove semantics and contour transport.

verifications.target: Milestone 4 Slice 1 reference chord progression seeding
verifications.details: Focused JS proof node scripts/test-reference-chord-seeding.js passed 8/8, get_errors reported no issues, and post-verifier confirmed the slice stayed bounded to producer-only chord_map seeding from referenceProfile.raw.chords without protocol/runtime expansion.

Pre-verifier confirmed the safest truthful first Milestone 4 slice is producer-only seeding of chord_map from referenceProfile.raw.chords with a focused JS proof file, because the reference analysis shape already exists and downstream chord_map transport/runtime consumption are already wired.

Read-only assessment concluded that Milestone 3 slices 1-4 now cover the strongest already-wired deterministic repair sinks, while remaining ideas are weaker or less truthful than starting Milestone 4 through the existing referenceProfile.raw.chords -> chord_map path.

Focused proof passed: python -m pytest tests/test_output_analyzer.py -q => 49 passed, 7 warnings. Final verifier confirmed the slice remained bounded to onset-density correction translation, used a conservative current-target drum-light threshold, and preserved mute_drums deduplication.

Read-only decomposition selected onset-density-to-mute_drums escalation as the safest next slice because onset-density issues already exist in the analyzer while mute_drums is the only fully proven deterministic downstream sink for an over-dense drum-light mismatch. Generic density reduction, broader timbre swaps, and tension-shape repair were rejected as less truthful under the current transport and analyzer surfaces.
Focused proofs passed: pytest MUSE/tests/test_output_analyzer.py -q => 45 passed, 7 warnings; node copilot-Liku-cli/scripts/test-output-analysis-repair.js => 11 passed.

Final verifier confirmed the slice remained bounded to centroid-direction EQ repair only, kept non-directional adjust_eq guidance-only, allowed deterministic retry routing to consume directional adjust_eq only when critic metrics were otherwise green, and preserved existing acceptance/audio gating semantics.

Pre-verifier confirmed a truthful bounded Slice 3 exists, but not as producer-only work: output_analyzer.py must first emit explicit EQ direction (too bright vs too dark) because current adjust_eq corrections only say 'Apply corrective EQ.' The downstream brightness/warmth sink already exists, so the safe slice is analyzer + producer + focused Python/JS proof updates, excluding adapter/protocol/regeneration surfaces.

node scripts/test-output-analysis-repair.js passed (8/8). Final verifier confirmed the producer retry loop now takes a real deterministic structured-repair fast path when actionable corrections exist and critic metrics are otherwise green, preserves the broader refinement path when corrections are missing or critics still fail, and leaves acceptance/audio gating semantics unchanged.

Read-only decomposition found that builder.regenerateSection() and take-generation surfaces are only partially or apparently wired on the Copilot JSON-RPC path, so the safest real next slice was producer-only deterministic structured-repair retry routing rather than section regeneration or take selection.

node scripts/test-output-analysis-repair.js passed (5/5) and python -m pytest tests/test_output_analyzer.py tests/test_score_plan_adapter.py -q passed (49/49). Final verifier confirmed producer-side correction translation now reaches real downstream levers through score_plan_to_parsed_prompt(), mute_drums and avoid_instruments exclusions are re-applied after track adaptation, and critic/audio acceptance-gating semantics remain unchanged.

Read-only decomposition confirmed output_analyzer.py already contained the correction engine and selected producer-side correction translation as the safest first slice, with a follow-up requirement to prove any new avoid-list levers survive the score-plan adaptation bridge downstream.

Read-only verifier confirmed `_create_chord_track()` was still the safest highest-ROI surface, but tightened the proof requirements: Slice 2 needed both a direct primary-chord register-lift assertion and a fail-open assertion for unusable explicit arcs, not just `tension_arc=None`.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_tension_arc.py (59 passed), tests/test_tension_arc_integration.py (10 passed), tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (6 passed), tests/test_sprint6_wiring.py (7 passed), tests/test_sprint8_batch_c.py (10 passed), and the combined subset run (92 passed). Read-only verifier confirmed the slice remained bounded to primary chord register authority, applied only on explicit usable tension arcs, covered both strategy and fallback chord paths, and preserved fail-open behavior for missing/unusable arcs.

Read-only decomposition selected explicit-arc-aware primary chord register shaping as the safest next bounded slice because `_create_chord_track()` already centralizes tension, complexity, motif accent reuse, and harmonic-bed rendering. The chosen slice avoids broader transition API work and arranger construction-order refactors while preserving explicit-arc-only fail-open discipline.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_tension_arc_integration.py (7 passed), tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (6 passed), tests/test_sprint6_wiring.py (7 passed), and the combined subset run (20 passed). Read-only verifier inspection confirmed the slice remained bounded to auxiliary-layer orchestration, tied new gating only to explicit usable tension arcs, and preserved fail-open baseline behavior when no arc exists.
Staged only the intended Milestone 1 files and created commit 811c256 with a clean final git status, establishing a fresh baseline before Milestone 2 decomposition.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (6 passed), tests/test_arranger_motifs.py (43 passed), tests/test_sprint7_wiring.py (10 passed), and the combined subset run (59 passed). A baseline-aware verifier pass confirmed the new Slice 3 behavior stayed bounded to primary chord-track onset-group velocity contouring plus fail-open wiring on top of the accepted Slice 1/2 baseline.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_motif_engine.py (60 passed), tests/test_arranger_motifs.py (43 passed), tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (4 passed), and the combined subset run (107 passed). Post-verifier inspection confirmed dedicated Ethiopian-family motif fallbacks, section-correct Ethiopian-family motif mappings, scoped motif-aware melody broadening only inside generate_arrangement_with_motifs(), and velocity-only Ethiopian-family bass reuse with fail-open behavior.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_motif_engine.py (56 passed), tests/test_arranger_motifs.py (37 passed), tests/test_motif_melody_integration.py (2 passed), and the combined subset run (95 passed). Post-verifier inspection confirmed genre-specific motif fallbacks, classical section-name alignment, fragment transform support, scoped motif-aware non-chorus melody enablement, and repeated-section counter alignment without changing plain create_arrangement defaults.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_output_analyzer.py, tests/test_genre_normalization.py, tests/test_arranger_motifs.py, and tests/test_sprint11_batch_b.py (122 passed, 2 skipped). Post-verifier inspection confirmed neo_soul now has explicit defaults, arrangement, renderer, and gain-staging coverage, and that rnb, trap_soul, house, ambient, ethiopian, ethio_jazz, eskista, and ethiopian_traditional now have explicit AUDIO_GENRE_TARGETS entries. Residual risk: no direct executing test yet covers the new neo_soul branches inside audio_renderer.py; those paths were verified by code inspection only.

verifications.target: genre realism and frequency-awareness roadmap analysis
verifications.details: Parallel Explore subagents plus direct file inspection converged on three main truths: 1) rendered-audio scoring still has coverage gaps for several parseable genres, 2) instrument-aware realism exists mainly in MIDI/register space rather than audio role-band validation, and 3) the best implementation path is to unify existing analyzers and normalization before adding deeper listener models.

Focused pytest passed for tests/test_output_analyzer.py and tests/test_prompt_parser_key.py. A stubbed ProducerAgent smoke harness showed that critics passing with outputAnalysis.passed=false now yields COMPLETED_WITH_CRITIC_FAIL, while the same path with outputAnalysis.passed=true yields COMPLETED_SUCCESS.

Code inspection showed that ProducerAgent success is controlled by MIDI critics, while rendered-audio analysis is advisory only. OutputAnalyzer lacks a neo_soul target profile, and recent neo_soul render reports consistently show genre_match_score=0.75 with passed=true, matching the scorer's unknown-genre fallback.

verifications.target: copilot-liku-cli producer per-track handoff decomposition plus mastering propagation
verifications.details: Bounded producer run completed through the shared PythonBridge with 6 real Producer->Researcher handoffs (drums, bass, keys, lead, pad, fx). The generated render report consumed mastering values target_lufs=-15, master_ceiling_db=-0.5, stem_headroom_db=-7, brightness_target=0, warmth_target=1 and reported true_peak_limiter=ceiling=-0.5dBTP.

Focused pytest run passed for tests/test_score_plan_adapter.py and tests/test_render_report_schema.py (5 tests total), covering structured mastering extraction plus render report mastering diagnostics.

With maxIterations=2 and allowQualityGateBypass=true, the producer executed attempt_1 and attempt_2 before bypass. attempt_2 plan changed drum and bass pattern guidance, reduced lead/fx activation in lower-energy sections, and refined tension/chord choices while preserving the requested 16-bar D minor neo-soul structure.

verifications.target: copilot-liku-cli producer regression after model/fallback fixes
verifications.details: Producer preserved 88 BPM, D minor, and requested drums/bass/Rhodes/muted guitar/pad/fx track roles. Initial oversized plan timed out at 300s; after duration fitting, a 16-bar neo-soul plan rendered successfully in ~105s.
